claude.text: {"type":{"typeId":"child_mood_log","displayName":"Child Mood Log","displayNamePlural":"Child Mood Logs","description":"Tracks a child's daily mood along with preceding events, sleep quality, and contextual factors to help identify patterns in good and bad days.","examplePhrases":["Log Emma's mood today","Record that Lily had a great day","Track what happened before Max's meltdown","Add a mood entry for my daughter"],"attributes":[{"name":"child","label":"Child","valueType":"entityRef","refType":"contact","required":true},{"name":"date","label":"Date","valueType":"date","required":true,"defaultToNow":true},{"name":"moodRating","label":"Mood Rating","valueType":"enum","required":true,"enumValues":["very_bad","bad","neutral","good","very_good"]},{"name":"moodDescription","label":"Mood Description","valueType":"text","required":false},{"name":"precedingEvents","label":"What Happened Before","valueType":"text","required":false},{"name":"sleepQuality","label":"Sleep Quality (Night Before)","valueType":"enum","required":false,"enumValues":["poor","fair","good","excellent"]},{"name":"sleepHours","label":"Hours of Sleep","valueType":"decimal","required":false},{"name":"meals","label":"Meals/Nutrition Notes","valueType":"text","required":false},{"name":"physicalActivity","label":"Physical Activity","valueType":"text","required":false},{"name":"screenTime","label":"Screen Time (minutes)","valueType":"number","required":false},{"name":"socialContext","label":"Social Context","valueType":"text","required":false},{"name":"schoolDay","label":"School Day","valueType":"boolean","required":false},{"name":"notableStressors","label":"Notable Stressors","valueType":"text","required":false},{"name":"whatHelped","label":"What Helped","valueType":"text","required":false},{"name":"tags","label":"Tags","valueType":"tag","required":false}],"relations":[],"presentation":{"archetype":"event","primaryField":"moodRating","timestampField":"date"}},"skill":{"skillId":"log-child-mood","displayName":"Log Child Mood","description":"Creates a new mood log entry for a child, capturing their mood rating and the context of what preceded their day.","inputs":[{"name":"childId","valueType":"entityRef","source":"slot","required":true},{"name":"moodRating","valueType":"enum","source":"slot","required":true},{"name":"moodDescription","valueType":"text","source":"slot","required":false},{"name":"precedingEvents","valueType":"text","source":"slot","required":false},{"name":"sleepQuality","valueType":"enum","source":"slot","required":false},{"name":"sleepHours","valueType":"decimal","source":"slot","required":false},{"name":"notableStressors","valueType":"text","source":"slot","required":false},{"name":"whatHelped","valueType":"text","source":"slot","required":false}],"reads":[],"writes":["child_mood_log"],"steps":{"main":[{"op":"write_record","typeId":"child_mood_log","fields":{"child":"{childId}","date":"{today}","moodRating":"{moodRating}","moodDescription":"{moodDescription}","precedingEvents":"{precedingEvents}","sleepQuality":"{sleepQuality}","sleepHours":"{sleepHours}","notableStressors":"{notableStressors}","whatHelped":"{whatHelped}"},"into":"newEntry"},{"op":"format","template":"Logged {moodRating} mood for today. Entry saved.","into":"confirmation"}]},"dangerLevel":"safe"},"safetyAssessment":{"level":"safe","concerns":[],"notes":"This capability stores personal observations about a child's emotional state. The data is kept local-first and is useful for identifying patterns. No sensitive operations or external calls are involved. Pattern analysis across entries would require a separate read-focused skill with compute aggregations."}}
